title: Section 17
content: 1[Every Institute shall prepare], in such form and at such time every year as may be prescribed by rules, a budget in respect of the financial year next ensuing showing the estimated receipts and 1[expenditure of the concerned Institute] and shall forward to the Central Government such number of copies thereof as may be prescribed by rules.
footnote: 1 Subs. by s. 18, ibid., for "The Institute shall prepare" (w.e.f. 16-7-2012). 2 Subs. by s. 18, ibid., for "expenditure of the Institute" (w.e.f. 16-7-2012).
